description_long: This is a handheld megaphone with a large, flared gray horn and a cylindrical red body. The horn is bordered by a black rim and features a metallic clip on the top. The handle is ergonomically shaped and attached to the underside of the body, with a coiled black cable connecting to a rectangular control box at the rear. The rear control box is gray and features a vented panel, likely for battery access or speaker output, and a visible switch or button. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal components, and the surface is smooth with a semi-gloss finish.
description: A handheld megaphone with a gray flared horn, red cylindrical body, ergonomic handle, and a coiled cable leading to a rear control box.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the megaphone, the flared horn, red body, handle, and coiled cable.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the gray control box, vented panel, and the end of the coiled cable.
description_view_2: Opposite side view showing the horn, red body, handle, and the cable attachment.
description_view_3: Front view looking directly into the horn, revealing the circular mouthpiece and inner structure.
attribute_mouthpiece_design: Circular, recessed, and centrally located at the narrow end of the horn, with a smooth contour and no visible covering.
attribute_speaker_grill_pattern: Vertical slits on the rear control box; none visible on the horn.
